case_title: DEPHILIPPIS, DOMINICK VS BAY WEST PROPERTIES MANAGEMENT

CERT. RECEIPT TO BAY WEST PROPERTIES RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPHILIPPIS, DOMINICK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BAY WEST PROPERTIES MANAGEMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
